title: Bit select of constant fails
body:
---


Author Name: **Jeremy Bennett** (@jeremybennett)
Original Redmine Issue: 508 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2012-05-08


---

The following code fails:

```
module t (clk);

    input clk;

    wire  a;
    wire  b;

    assign b = 1'b0;
    assign a = b[0];

endmodule

```

The error is:

```
%Error: t/t_bitsel_const.v:23: Illegal bit or array select; variable already selected, or bad dimension: b
%Error: t/t_bitsel_const.v:23: Illegal bit or array select; variable already selected, or bad dimension

```

(where line 23 is the line @assign a = b[0];@)

This problem reportedly does not occur in older versions of Verilator, although I have yet to check that.

Please pull a test case from https://github.com/jeremybennett/verilator/tree/bitsel.
